nodes.name: Origma
nodes.summary: Origma（Origma）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Mountain mouse-warbler、Rusty mouse-warbler、Rockwarbler。

nodes.name: Mountain mouse-warbler
nodes.summary: The mountain mouse-warbler (Origma robusta) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. This species was formerly placed in the genus Crateroscelis, but following the publication of a molecular phylogenetic study of the scrubwrens and mouse-warblers in 2018, it was moved to the genus Origma. Taxonomy Origma robusta includes the following subspecies: Origma robusta peninsularis - (Hartert, 1930) Origma robusta bastille - (Diamond, 1969) Origma robusta diamondi - (Beehler & Prawiradilaga, 2010) Origma robusta deficiens - (Hartert, 1930) Origma robusta sanfordi - (Hartert, 1930) Origma robusta robusta - (De Vis, 1898) References
